questions.question: Consider a time series model that has been fitted to the data. What is the purpose of checking the residuals in a diagnostic plot, and what does it indicate about the model's fit?
questions.hint: Consider the characteristics of residuals in a diagnostic plot

questions.question: A time series model is checked for overfitting by calculating the values of the autocorrelation function (ACF) at different lags. What is the expected pattern of the ACF values if the model is underfitting?
questions.hint: Understand the behavior of ACF values underfitting

questions.question: A time series model has been fitted to the data, but the residuals show a non-random pattern. What further diagnostic checks can be performed to investigate this issue and potentially improve the model's fit?
questions.hint: Consider the implications of a non-random pattern in residuals
